text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The MIDST Challenge is a real, identifiable non-academic source (a competition hosted at SaTML 2025 by the Vector Institute), with a dedicated GitHub repository and website at VectorInstitute/MIDST. A formal arXiv paper (arXiv:2603.19185) also exists under a slightly fuller title. This is a valid citation to a real-world competition resource, not a hallucinated reference.
LINK: https://github.com/VectorInstitute/MIDST
